cadence_days.description: Re-score the inference population every N days. Default: 1.

horizon_days.description: Prediction horizon in days. The model predicts whether the target event occurs within this window.

inference_population.description: Inference population filter. Defaults to training_population if not set.

iteration_budget.description: Total training iterations allowed for the autoresearch loop. Default: 50.

output_person_property.description: Person property name for the prediction score. Auto-derived from target_event if omitted, e.g. 'predicted_p_pageview'.

plateau_iterations.description: Stop training if no improvement in this many consecutive iterations. Default: 10.

prediction_mode.description:
'adoption': predict first-time occurrence (users who haven't done it yet). 'continuation': predict repeat occurrence.

* `adoption` - Adoption
* `continuation` - Continuation

success_auc.description: Target AUC threshold. Training stops early if reached. Default: 0.75.

target_definition.description: Full target definition. Can be left empty to use target_event alone.

target_event.description: PostHog event name to predict, e.g. '$pageview' or 'signed_up'.

training_population.description: Training population filter. Use {} for all identified users.
